# Arcanea — Creative Intelligence Platform

> arcanea.ai | The world engine for creators who build with AI

## What Is Arcanea

Arcanea is a creative intelligence platform where creators chat with AI, build fantasy worlds, share what they make, and turn imagination into products. It combines a living mythology (10 Gates, 10 Guardians, 7 Academy Houses) with 42 MCP tools for world-building, an open-source ecosystem of 49 npm packages, and a social creation feed.

## Core Capabilities

- **Chat**: Talk with 16 AI personalities (Luminors) across music, writing, art, and world-building
- **Imagine**: Generate images with 5+ AI models via OpenRouter, Grok, Gemini
- **Worlds**: Build living universes with characters, locations, creatures, quests, artifacts, magic systems, and faction dynamics — all auto-linked
- **Library**: 190,000+ words of original creative philosophy across 17 collections
- **Academy**: 10-gate progression system from Apprentice to Luminor
- **MCP Server**: 42 tools for world-building via Model Context Protocol
- **Open Source**: 49 npm packages, 103 skills, 112 commands

## For AI Agents and Developers

### MCP Integration
Install: `npx @arcanea/mcp-server`

Available tools: generate_character, generate_location, generate_creature, generate_quest, generate_artifact, generate_magic, generate_name, analyze_factions, generate_conflict, assess_world, validate_canon, weave_narrative, and 30 more.

### REST API Bridge
POST https://arcanea.ai/api/worlds/mcp-bridge
Body: { "tool": "generate_character", "params": { "primaryElement": "Fire", "house": "Pyros" } }

### Key Pages
- /chat — AI chat with Luminor personalities
- /imagine — Image generation studio
- /worlds — World builder with graph visualization
- /library — 190K+ words of creative intelligence
- /academy — 10-gate learning progression
- /showcase — Live MCP tool demos with real output
- /changelog — Latest platform updates
- /developers — API documentation
- /ecosystem — 49 packages, 27 repos

## The Mythology (Reference Implementation)

Arcanea's own mythology serves as both content and framework:
- **Lumina & Nero**: Cosmic duality (Light creates form, Darkness holds potential)
- **Five Elements**: Fire, Water, Earth, Wind, Void/Spirit
- **Ten Gates**: Foundation through Source (each with Guardian deity and Godbeast)
- **Seven Houses**: Lumina, Nero, Pyros, Aqualis, Terra, Ventus, Synthesis
- **Magic Ranks**: Apprentice → Mage → Master → Archmage → Luminor

## Technical Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Vercel AI SDK, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, deployed on Vercel.

## Links

- Website: https://arcanea.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/frankxai
- npm: @arcanea/* packages
- MCP Server: @arcanea/mcp-server
